event: Homer reciting his verses to the Greeks
description: A sepia-toned or monochrome drawing depicting a classical scene. At right, a standing figure (Homer) appears to recite or declaim before a seated audience. The setting is a columned classical interior. Figures are draped in togas and classical garments. Some listeners appear deeply engaged while others recline. The composition has a theatrical quality with strong architectural framing. The medium appears to be ink wash or watercolor in brown tones.

_meta.title: Homer Reciting his Verses to the Greeks
